after.title: Strategic account rescue
after.status: At-risk escalation active with executive recovery owner routing and customer-visible audit history.
after.owner: Customer Success + Support + Finance + Executive Sponsor
after.riskSummary: 6 signals: strategic, account, rescue, enterprise account, open customer impact, audit required
after.customerMessage: Your delayed high-value order is under at-risk escalation. Recovery owners are coordinating the enterprise account across contract, support, invoice, shipment, and compliance context. The portal shows the customer-visible audit history while the recovery plan moves forward.
